info.title: astro-engine
info.description: Swiss Ephemeris HTTP microservice for natal, progressed, and transit chart calculations.

post.description: Returns planetary positions, house cusps, angles, and aspects for a birth date/time/location.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns planetary positions, house cusps, angles, aspects, and chart analysis (pattern, culminating/rising planet, distribution).

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns progressed planetary positions using secondary progression (1 day = 1 year).

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns planetary positions and house cusps for a given date/time/location.

transitTime.description: Transit time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns natal, secondary progressed, and transit charts in a single call, with optional cross-chart aspects.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

transitTime.description: Transit time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response
Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns natal charts for two persons and their cross-aspects.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response
Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns a midpoint-based composite chart for two persons.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response
Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns daily planetary positions and events (ingresses, stations, exact aspects) for a given month.
Returns all void-of-course Moon periods for a given month.
Returns the natal chart calculated for the exact moment when the transiting Sun returns to the natal Sun longitude in the target year.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

returnLat.description: Latitude for the return chart location

returnLon.description: Longitude for the return chart location

returnUtcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset at the return location

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.description: Returns planetary positions directed by the solar arc (the distance the progressed Sun has traveled from its natal position).

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

progressedDate.description: Target date for solar arc directions

post.description: Returns the natal chart calculated for the exact moment when the transiting Moon returns to the natal Moon longitude after the target date.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

targetDate.description: Find next lunar return after this date (ignored when returnJd is provided)

returnJd.description: Exact Julian Day of a specific return (from the list endpoint); when set, skips the targetDate solve

returnLat.description: Latitude for the return chart location

returnLon.description: Longitude for the return chart location

returnUtcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset at the return location

includeFixedStars.description: Include fixed star positions in the response

post.summary: List lunar returns for a calendar year
post.description: Returns every lunar return moment (~13) whose local datetime falls within the given year at the return location.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format, or null if unknown

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth

year.description: Calendar year (return location local time) to list lunar returns for

returnLat.description: Latitude for the return chart location

returnLon.description: Longitude for the return chart location

returnUtcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset at the return location

julianDay.description: Julian Day (UT) of the lunar return moment

datetime.description: Local wall-clock datetime at the return location (ISO-like)

post.description: Returns MC/IC/AC/DC planetary lines for the given birth moment, suitable for plotting on a world map.

birthTime.description: Birth time in HH:MM format. Required — astrocartography depends on exact rotation.

utcOffsetMinutes.description: UTC offset in minutes at time of birth
